---
title: "Assessment of numerical advantage in animal contests"
image: "../images/card_pics/terr_slas.jpg"
description: "We explore how animals perceive and respond to differences in group size during conflicts. We use field-based experiments reveal how territory holders assess intrusion threat based on numerical advantage."
categories: ["contest assessment"]
contributors: "Tanner Warder"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
